summary: Mobile responsiveness testing completed for all 11 inventory tabs on viewport 390x844. All tabs render correctly with proper mobile layouts. Minor issue: Valorización tab shows console warnings about chart dimensions (-1x-1) but chart still renders.

issues: Console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - Recharts ResponsiveContainer may need explicit minHeight/minWidth on mobile

test_results.navigation: PASS - Login > Opciones > Config > Inventario Maestro works correctly
test_results.tab_1_insumos: PASS - Stock numbers visible, action buttons (copy/edit/delete) visible, search and category filter work
test_results.tab_2_produccion: PASS - Header with 'Ver Historial' button visible, production cards readable with Producir/Receta buttons
test_results.tab_3_almacenes: PASS - 'Nuevo Almacén' button visible, warehouse cards with edit/delete buttons visible
test_results.tab_4_proveedores: PASS - Search bar, 'Nuevo Proveedor' button, category filters visible, supplier cards readable
test_results.tab_5_recetas: PASS - Lista/Reporte/Nueva buttons visible, search bar and health filters (All/Crit/Adv/OK) visible, recipe cards show margin%/cost/PVP
test_results.tab_6_stock: PASS - Header icon buttons (refresh/alerts/transfer/adjust) visible, search/filters stacked vertically, table scrollable horizontally
test_results.tab_7_compras: PASS - Lista/Gráficos/Exportar/Nueva buttons visible, period filters (Hoy/Ayer/Semana/Mes/Todo) all visible, date pickers and status/supplier filters full width
test_results.tab_8_valorizacion: PASS with warning - Total value (RD$ 9,753.46) visible, chart renders but has console dimension warnings
test_results.tab_9_auditoria: PASS - Header with 'Auditoría de Insumos' title and Exportar button visible, 3 stats cards readable, filters stacked vertically
test_results.tab_10_config: PASS - 3 switches (Permitir venta sin stock, Deducir automáticamente, Mostrar alertas) visible with 'GUARDAR CONFIGURACIÓN' button
test_results.tab_11_asistente: PASS - Header with Sugerencias/Alertas/Márgenes buttons visible, filters stacked vertically, 4 summary cards in 2x2 grid

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add minHeight to ResponsiveContainer in ValuationTab.jsx to prevent chart dimension warnings on mobile
critical_code_review_comments: All inventory tabs have proper mobile-responsive layouts with flex-col/flex-row breakpoints
Tables use overflow-x-auto for horizontal scrolling on mobile
Buttons use responsive text (hidden sm:inline pattern) to show icons only on mobile
Filter sections stack vertically on mobile using flex-col sm:flex-row
Summary cards use grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 for proper mobile layout
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile responsiveness testing for all 11 inventory tabs completed successfully. All tabs render correctly on 390x844 viewport. The only minor issue is Valorización tab chart dimension warnings in console, but the chart still renders correctly. Navigation path: Login with PIN 10000 > Opciones (bottom nav) > Config > Inventario Maestro.
